title: DTU Notification 2026 - Walk-in-Interview for Multi Tasking Staff Posts
description: Delhi Technological University (DTU) has declared the official ntification fr 2026. To fill up the vacancies for Multi-Tasking Staff Jobs. Those candidates who have qualified in the 12th or Diploma can grab this chance and apply for the DTU Notification 202 6. Here we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, applciation fee, and how to apply for these posts. If you are looking for more, here is a list of Government Jobs in 2026 that you can all apply for...
